title: Wrong c++ code genetaed => wrong simulation

features.name: nested conditional sequential writes to unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block with nested if conditions writing to the same unpacked array element, where outer branch assigns one value and inner branch overrides with different value

features.name: unpacked array of registers with sequential access
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of registers (reg [31:0] name [N]) used in sequential logic with multiple conditional assignments
